title: Add webglOpacity() style helper for WebGL series

steps.description: Add vertex shader snippets for opacity (aOpacity attribute, vOpacity varying)
steps.details: Add header: 'attribute float aOpacity;\nvarying float vOpacity;' and body: 'vOpacity = aOpacity;'

steps.description: Add fragment shader snippets for opacity (vOpacity varying, multiply gl_FragColor.a)
steps.details: Add header: 'varying float vOpacity;' and body: 'gl_FragColor = vec4(gl_FragColor.rgb, gl_FragColor.a * vOpacity);' — must be appended LAST
size=1, constantAttribute([1.0]).size(1) default, attribute().size(1) for per-datum, initial value 1.0 (fully opaque)

steps.description: Include gl.BLEND enable lines in programBuilder.js if not already present
steps.details: Idempotent — if #1899 already merged, these lines are no-ops

steps.description: Write index.js demonstrating constant opacity and per-datum opacity side by side or toggled
npm run bundle && npm run bundle-min && npm test && npm run lint
Visual verification in browser — constant opacity, per-datum opacity, interaction with fillColor alpha
Capture before/after screenshots (user provides from real browser)
Add changeset, commit, push with explicit refspec
Draft PR body for user review BEFORE creating PR
Create upstream PR with before/after images
Comment on d3fc/d3fc#1893 linking the PR
